name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.18.1: vault-local wiki-presync skill discovery — probe and invoke before vault push. v1.18.0: peer-aware vault push gate — SAVE/MERGE acquire skillwiki advisory lockfile. v1.17.1: doctor-worker skillwiki bridge + research-worker stale buckets + wiki-sync dependency. v1.17.0: vault auto-commit gate + AUDIT dirty-tree check. v1.16.4: step 13 AUDIT header clarified — '(conditional — every 3 cycles OR on ClaudeMd?: yes)' matches body trigger logic; completes the step 12/13/14 header audit started in v1.16.3. v1.16.3: step 12 cadence clarification — ADR sub-section now explicit that proj-decide runs in the SAME cycle that flagged WorkflowShift?: yes. v1.16.2: QUERY step adds stale-premise check. v1.16.1: setup-dev-loop Section M runtime codex probe. v1.16.0: auto-archive originating raw transcripts via `closes:` frontmatter. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review. v1.14.0: auto-compact firing probe. v1.13.0: removed /compact + /clear. v1.12.0: dep-drift detector. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 13 config sections (A-M).
